items.name: emblem-of-severed-fate
items.note: This set falls off in terms of damage if [[character:xingqiu]] has less than 130% [[stat:er]].

items.name: noblesse-oblige
items.note: Offers party-wide [[stat:atk]] boost, you can use this set on [[character:xingqiu]] **if nobody else on the party is able to use it better**. If someone else on the team **already has [[set:noblesse-oblige]] (4), [[set:noblesse-oblige]] (4) should not be used**.

note.en: Outperforms **[[set:emblem-of-severed-fate]]** on **[[element:freeze]] Teams**. However, it is generally **not recommended** to farm specifically for this set.
note.fr: Meilleur que **[[set:emblem-of-severed-fate]]** dans les equipes **[[element:freeze]]**. Cependant, il n'est generalement **pas recommande** de farmer specifiquement pour ce set.
